# Content Angles

## Educational Hooks
- 3 mistakes homeowners make when choosing aluminum glass doors.
- Why two jobs with the same square meters still get different quotes.
- How to inspect sealing, hinge quality, and frame finishing before payment.

## Trust Angles
- Before and after of a real house in a named area.
- Workshop to installation timeline.
- Water sealing or closing test on a finished project.

## Conversion Angles
- Free survey in specific service areas.
- Limited booking slots this week.
- Quote comparison without hidden rework costs.

## Referral Angles
- One house leads to neighbor jobs.
- Family introduction stories.
- Why project photos from the same area build trust faster.
